top3.sql:
SELECT 
    AVG(AvgScrWrite) AS average_writing_score,
    schools.City
FROM satscores
JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
)
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT s.AvgScrWrite, s.CITY
FROM (
    SELECT satscores.cds, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgScrWrite, schools.City
    FROM satscores
    JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr >= (
        SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
        FROM satscores
        WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
    )
    AND satscores.NumGE1500 >= 1500
    GROUP BY satscores.cds, schools.City
    ORDER BY satscores.NumTstTakr DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS s;

SELECT 
    AVG(AvgScrWrite) AS average_writing_score,
    schools.City
FROM satscores
JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
)
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT s.AvgScrWrite, s.CITY
FROM (
    SELECT satscores.cds, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgScrWrite, schools.City
    FROM satscores
    JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr >= (
        SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
        FROM satscores
        WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
    )
    AND satscores.NumGE1500 >= 1500
    GROUP BY satscores.cds, schools.City
    ORDER BY satscores.NumTstTakr DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS s;

SELECT sc.AvgScrWrite, sch.City  
FROM satscores sc  
JOIN schools sch ON sc.cds = sch.CDSCode  
WHERE sc.NumGE1500 >= 1500  
ORDER BY sc.NumTstTakr DESC  
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
    AVG(AvgScrWrite) AS average_writing_score,
    schools.City
FROM satscores
JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
)
GROUP BY schools.City;

SELECT s.AvgScrWrite, s.CITY
FROM (
    SELECT satscores.cds, AVG(satscores.AvgScrWrite) AS AvgScrWrite, schools.City
    FROM satscores
    JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
    WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr >= (
        SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
        FROM satscores
        WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
    )
    AND satscores.NumGE1500 >= 1500
    GROUP BY satscores.cds, schools.City
    ORDER BY satscores.NumTstTakr DESC
    LIMIT 1
) AS s;

SELECT sc.AvgScrWrite, sch.City  
FROM satscores sc  
JOIN schools sch ON sc.cds = sch.CDSCode  
WHERE sc.NumGE1500 >= 1500  
ORDER BY sc.NumTstTakr DESC  
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT 
    AVG(AvgScrWrite) AS average_writing_score,
    schools.City
FROM satscores
JOIN schools ON satscores.cds = schools.CDSCode
WHERE satscores.NumTstTakr = (
    SELECT MAX(NumTstTakr)
    FROM satscores
    WHERE NumGE1500 >= 1500
)
GROUP BY schools.City;
